title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. aligerum
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. aligerum, also known as the Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. aligerum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
